name: Elastic N.V.
summary: Elastic N.V. is a technology company that builds search-powered solutions. Its core products include Elasticsearch, Kibana, and the Elastic Stack, offered via self-managed subscriptions and cloud-based Elastic Cloud deployments. Elastic serves enterprise use cases including search, observability, and security analytics. The company operates globally and generates revenue primarily through subscriptions, including consumption-based arrangements for its cloud offerings.
